workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for Dawn ResourceTable and immediates APIs with explicit feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability. Command contract explicitly sets async_diagnostics featurePolicy=emulate-when-unavailable for deterministic execution on feature-limited adapters.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples P1 resource-table contract: per-command sequence normalization with deterministic feature-gating parity support.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7

workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates macro (500)

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract with explicit feature-gating parity: resource_table_immediates repeated 500x and normalized per iteration. Command contract explicitly sets async_diagnostics featurePolicy=emulate-when-unavailable for deterministic execution on feature-limited adapters.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier contract

Command contract explicitly sets async_diagnostics featurePolicy=emulate-when-unavailable for deterministic execution on feature-limited adapters.
